productDisplayName: Gliders Men Black Derby Formal Shoes
description: Style Note The right shoe to beat the corporate mid-week blues from gliders. There is a reason the brand is a household name and this shoe shows us why. Easy on the pocket and easy on the eye, we love this jet black pair! Find a pair your size and buy them now, before we run out of stock.  Product Details Square toed black shoe with synthetic upper  Fabric inner and padding around the mouth Four hole lace upsTPU outsole with diamond patterned lugs Material and careSyntheticDo not machine wash or store in direct sunlightRemove dust with a dry clean cloth
